clusters.rationale: Stories in Button.stories.tsx are the direct consumers of the edited file; the change is a comment-only addition of AGENT_EVAL_MARKER to Button.tsx.
Source.stories.tsx and Preview.stories.tsx (both modified) import Button transitively through the docs blocks layer, making them the next most directly affected group.
Modal, Popover, Tooltip, and TooltipNote stories share Button as a dependency via the overlay/interactive primitives layer.
Select and SelectOption stories depend on Button internally and form a self-contained island of related stories.

Tabs, Toolbar, AbstractToolbar, TooltipMessage, ActionList, Bar, Card, Collapsible, ToggleButton, and InteractiveTooltipWrapper stories are all related through shared core component imports that include Button.
Manager-namespaced stories (Sidebar, Layout, Panel, Notifications, Settings, etc.) are transitively affected because manager UI components consume core Button/overlay primitives.

Catch-all for all remaining affected stories spanning addons (docs blocks, a11y, vitest, onboarding), actions, component-testing, controls, and highlight — all transitively touched by the Button.tsx comment change.
